summary: A Fox News 'Jesse Watters Primetime' interview clip with Border Patrol Chief Greg Bovino discussing violence against ICE, cutting to live B-roll of an anti-ICE protest in Charlotte, NC. Standard cable-news interview with lower-thirds and chyrons; not a produced or music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: VIOLENCE AGAINST ICE SKYROCKETS; NOW: ANTI-ICE PROTEST IN NORTH CAROLINA; GREG BOVINO CHIEF BORDER PATROL AGENT; JESSE WATTERS PRIMETIME
